name: Lady Boy Friends The Series
original_name: Lady Boy Friends The Series เพื่อนกันมันส์ดี
overview: The story of Jet-New and their friends in Class /13 (Grade 10 – Grade 12) unfolds through the character named Pete. It depicts the fun and excitement of teenage life, where hormones are surging. The narrative explores the nerve-wracking battles faced by a group of LGBT students filled with conflicts and complexities. Life in an all-boys school brims with curiosity and the desire to explore. The emergence of love stems from the teenagers' curiosity about life, the unknown within their hearts, the fear of non-acceptance, or simply the fear and confusion within their own hearts.
